title: Comprehensive Humor Pattern Taxonomy for Video Analysis
purpose: Master reference for training model to recognize and analyze humor mechanisms

1_literal_interpretation.name: Literal Interpretation
1_literal_interpretation.definition: Taking figurative language, idioms, or expressions literally for comedic effect
1_literal_interpretation.structure: Figurative statement → Literal enactment → Absurdity from mismatch
1_literal_interpretation.psychology: Incongruity between intended meaning and executed meaning

2_wordplay_disambiguation.name: Wordplay/Disambiguation
2_wordplay_disambiguation.definition: Puns, homophones, double meanings where visual context determines correct interpretation
2_wordplay_disambiguation.structure: Ambiguous word/phrase → Visual evidence → Unexpected meaning revealed
2_wordplay_disambiguation.psychology: Language ambiguity resolved through non-linguistic channel

3_audio_visual_contradiction.name: Audio-Visual Contradiction
3_audio_visual_contradiction.definition: What is shown visually contradicts what is said or heard
3_audio_visual_contradiction.structure: Audio channel (words/tone) → Visual channel (body/action) → Contradiction creates irony
3_audio_visual_contradiction.psychology: Forced to process conflicting information, irony emerges from gap
key_examples: Perfect shift (robot voice vs exhausted body)

4_hidden_motive_reveal.name: Hidden Motive Reveal
4_hidden_motive_reveal.definition: Character's true intention revealed unexpectedly, reframing previous actions
4_hidden_motive_reveal.structure: Apparent motive shown → Evidence accumulates → True motive revealed

5_pov_perspective_subversion.name: POV/Perspective Subversion
5_pov_perspective_subversion.definition: Unexpected shift in viewpoint that reframes the situation
5_pov_perspective_subversion.structure: Establish POV → Trigger event → POV shifts, changes meaning
5_pov_perspective_subversion.psychology: Challenges assumption about whose perspective we share
key_examples: Tip deliberation is cashier speaking (not customer thinking)
Food approaches then swerves to other table
5_pov_perspective_subversion.notes: Uses scenographic techniques - POV shot + sound perspective implies internal dialogue

6_absurd_escalation.name: Absurd Escalation
6_absurd_escalation.structure: Normal situation → Trigger → Response exceeds appropriate level → Continues escalating
key_examples: Pan shakes itself at max skill level

7_task_interpretation_ambiguity.name: Task Interpretation Ambiguity
7_task_interpretation_ambiguity.definition: Ambiguous instruction leads to unexpected interpretation
7_task_interpretation_ambiguity.structure: Task given → Ambiguity in wording → Unexpected execution
7_task_interpretation_ambiguity.psychology: Gap between speaker intent and listener interpretation

8_social_script_exploitation.name: Social Script Exploitation
8_social_script_exploitation.definition: Using social conventions/expectations against their intended purpose
8_social_script_exploitation.structure: Social script invoked → Exploited/subverted → Unexpected outcome

9_rule_of_three_subversion.name: Rule of Three Subversion
9_rule_of_three_subversion.definition: Two examples establish pattern, third breaks it
9_rule_of_three_subversion.psychology: Pattern recognition setup for violation payoff

10_callback_payoff.name: Callback Payoff
10_callback_payoff.definition: Earlier element returns with new meaning
10_callback_payoff.training_need: LOW - Simpsons provides strong structural examples

11_anticlimactic_resolution.name: Anticlimactic Resolution
11_anticlimactic_resolution.structure: Tension builds → Dramatic framing → Underwhelming reveal

12_delayed_punchline.name: Delayed Punchline
12_delayed_punchline.definition: Extended pause before payoff amplifies release
12_delayed_punchline.structure: Setup → Unusual pause → Punchline (stronger for wait)

14_role_reversal.name: Role Reversal
14_role_reversal.psychology: Disrupts ingrained social scripts about power

16_competence_mismatch.name: Competence Mismatch
16_competence_mismatch.definition: Extreme competence in one area, failure in related area
16_competence_mismatch.structure: Show competence → Reveal incompetence in adjacent domain
16_competence_mismatch.psychology: Incongruity between expected skill transfer and reality

18_circular_logic_loop.name: Circular Logic Loop
18_circular_logic_loop.definition: Argument returns to starting point through valid-seeming steps
18_circular_logic_loop.structure: A → B → C → implies A again
18_circular_logic_loop.psychology: Cognitive dissonance from recognizing the trap

19_false_equivalence_comedy.name: False Equivalence Comedy
19_false_equivalence_comedy.definition: Treating vastly different things as equivalent
19_false_equivalence_comedy.structure: Present two things → Claim equivalence → Absurdity apparent

20_pedantic_correction_loop.name: Pedantic Correction Loop
20_pedantic_correction_loop.definition: Technically correct responses that miss obvious intent
20_pedantic_correction_loop.structure: Clear intent statement → Over-precise correction → Repeat
20_pedantic_correction_loop.psychology: Tension between social understanding and literal truth

21_unfalsifiable_logic.name: Unfalsifiable Logic
21_unfalsifiable_logic.definition: Logic that cannot be argued against despite being absurd
21_unfalsifiable_logic.structure: Absurd claim → Challenge → Technically valid justification
21_unfalsifiable_logic.psychology: Recognition of logical trap + its absurdity

22_passive_aggressive_compliance.name: Passive-Aggressive Compliance
22_passive_aggressive_compliance.definition: Following rules in technically correct but socially aggressive way
22_passive_aggressive_compliance.structure: Unreasonable request → Excessively literal compliance → Requester realizes

23_uncomfortable_truth_admission.name: Uncomfortable Truth Admission
23_uncomfortable_truth_admission.definition: Casually admitting what shouldn't be admitted
23_uncomfortable_truth_admission.structure: Normal interaction → Unexpected honesty → Uncomfortable reaction

24_collective_delusion_acknowledgment.name: Collective Delusion Acknowledgment
24_collective_delusion_acknowledgment.definition: Group mutually agrees to maintain obvious fiction
24_collective_delusion_acknowledgment.structure: Establish fiction → Both acknowledge knowing → Continue anyway

25_solidarity_through_suffering.name: Solidarity Through Suffering
25_solidarity_through_suffering.structure: Individual suffering → Shared recognition → Cathartic connection

26_self_sabotage_recognition.name: Self-Sabotage Recognition
26_self_sabotage_recognition.definition: Knowingly doing something against own interest while narrating awareness
26_self_sabotage_recognition.structure: Identify bad choice → Acknowledge → Do anyway → Consequence
26_self_sabotage_recognition.psychology: Relatability of knowing something is wrong but doing it

27_oblivious_protagonist.name: Oblivious Protagonist
27_oblivious_protagonist.definition: Character misses what's obvious to everyone else
27_oblivious_protagonist.structure: Set up irony → Character unaware → Others/audience see truth

28_wrong_lesson_learned.name: Wrong Lesson Learned
28_wrong_lesson_learned.definition: Character draws completely incorrect conclusion from experience
28_wrong_lesson_learned.psychology: Gap between logical and actual conclusion

29_selective_professional_amnesia.name: Selective Professional Amnesia
29_selective_professional_amnesia.definition: Conveniently forgetting job skills when it suits
29_selective_professional_amnesia.structure: Complex task requested → Sudden incompetence → Competence returns after avoided

30_lampshading.name: Lampshading
30_lampshading.definition: Explicitly calling attention to absurd/implausible element
30_lampshading.psychology: Breaking fourth wall creates audience complicity

31_format_awareness.name: Format Awareness
31_format_awareness.definition: Characters demonstrate knowledge they're in a video/show
31_format_awareness.structure: Normal content → Format constraint acknowledged → Used comedically

32_trope_inversion.name: Trope Inversion
32_trope_inversion.structure: Set up trope expectation → Subvert with opposite/absence

33_recursive_commentary.name: Recursive Commentary
33_recursive_commentary.structure: Create content → Acknowledge what it's doing → Meta-layer

34_public_vs_private_persona.name: Public vs Private Persona
34_public_vs_private_persona.definition: Juxtaposition between customer-facing and real self
34_public_vs_private_persona.structure: Show public face → Reveal private reality → Contrast creates humor

35_expectation_vs_reality.name: Expectation vs Reality
35_expectation_vs_reality.definition: Direct comparison of imagined vs actual outcome
35_expectation_vs_reality.structure: Expectation shown → Reality shown → Gap creates humor

36_accumulation_comedy.name: Accumulation Comedy
36_accumulation_comedy.definition: Same small thing keeps happening until quantity becomes absurd
36_accumulation_comedy.structure: Thing once → Twice → N times (quantity is the joke)
36_accumulation_comedy.psychology: Individually reasonable becomes absurd in aggregate

37_one_upmanship_spiral.name: One-Upmanship Spiral
37_one_upmanship_spiral.definition: Characters compete to outdo each other absurdly
37_one_upmanship_spiral.structure: A claims → B one-ups → A escalates → Spiral
37_one_upmanship_spiral.psychology: Competitive instinct taken to logical extreme

38_diminishing_returns_comedy.name: Diminishing Returns Comedy
38_diminishing_returns_comedy.definition: Each attempt produces progressively worse results

39_non_reaction.name: The Non-Reaction
39_non_reaction.definition: Absurd situation receives conspicuously no reaction
39_non_reaction.structure: Absurd happens → Characters continue normally → Absurdity amplified
39_non_reaction.psychology: Expected reaction missing forces audience to hold tension alone

immediate_priorities.description: Patterns with HIGH training need and sparse coverage
immediate_priorities.action: Create explicit reasoning-chain examples for these patterns

simpsons_mining_targets.description: Patterns where Simpsons is best source
simpsons_mining_targets.action: Use Simpsons examples to teach structural principles

tiktok_strength_leverage.description: Patterns where TikTok excels - ensure well represented
tiktok_strength_leverage.action: These are already strong - maintain representation

simpsons_unique_strengths: Structured category labels (contrast, escalation, callback, deadpan_context)
cross_reference_insights.complementary_value: TikTok teaches WHAT patterns look like in short-form video. Simpsons teaches HOW patterns unfold structurally over time.
